---
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - top=0.72in
      - bottom=0.78in
      - left=0.82in
      - right=0.82in
    colorlinks: true
    urlcolor: snublue
    linkcolor: snublue
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{tabularx}
        \usepackage{array}
        \usepackage{ragged2e}
        \usepackage{setspace}
        \definecolor{snublue}{HTML}{1F3A5F}
        \pagestyle{empty}
        \setstretch{1.08}
        \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
        \setlength{\parskip}{4pt}
        \setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=1.2em, itemsep=2.5pt, topsep=3pt, parsep=0pt}
        \setlist[enumerate]{leftmargin=1.45em, itemsep=3pt, topsep=3pt, parsep=0pt}
        \titleformat{\section}
          {\large\bfseries\color{snublue}}
          {}
          {0pt}
          {}
          [\titlerule]
        \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1.05em}{0.45em}
        \titleformat{\subsection}
          {\normalsize\bfseries}
          {}
          {0pt}
          {}
        \titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{0.7em}{0.2em}
---

\begin{center}
{\LARGE \textbf{Kunwoo Park}}\\[2pt]
Ph.D. Student, Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering\\
Seoul National University\\[5pt]
\href{mailto:imotdnif43@snu.ac.kr}{imotdnif43@snu.ac.kr}
\quad | \quad
\href{https://github.com/KunwooPark}{github.com/KunwooPark}
\quad | \quad
\href{https://www.linkedin.com/in/kunwoo-park-38ba13329/}{LinkedIn}
\quad | \quad
\href{https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=KrNjLQgAAAAJ}{Google Scholar}
\end{center}

## Research Interests

Optical computing; disordered photonics; topological photonics; open quantum systems.

## Education

\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{@{} X r @{}}
\textbf{Integrated M.S./Ph.D.}, Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering & 2024.09 -- present \\
Seoul National University \quad Advisor: \href{https://waves.snu.ac.kr}{Sunkyu Yu} \quad (Expected: 2029.08) & \\[4pt]
\textbf{B.S.}, Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering & 2018.03 -- 2024.08 \\
Seoul National University & \\[4pt]
\textbf{Military Service}, Republic of Korea Army & 2020.12 -- 2022.06 \\
\end{tabularx}

## Academic Positions

- Placeholder.

## Research Experience

- **Optical Computing.** Placeholder.
- **Disordered Photonics.** Placeholder.
- **Topological Photonics.** Placeholder.
- **Open Quantum Systems.** Placeholder.

## Publications

### Preprints

1. Gitae Lee, Seungmok Youn, Ikbeom Lee, **Kunwoo Park**, Duwhan Hwang, Xianji Piao\textsuperscript{*}, Namkyoo Park\textsuperscript{*} and Sunkyu Yu\textsuperscript{*}. Non-Hermitian stealthy hyperuniformity. [arXiv:2602.09458](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.09458).

2. **Kunwoo Park**, Ikbeom Lee, Seungmok Youn, Gitae Lee, Namkyoo Park\textsuperscript{*} and Sunkyu Yu\textsuperscript{*}. Hypergraph modelling of wave scattering to speed-up material design. [arXiv:2507.15329](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.15329).

### Journal Articles

1. Seungmok Youn, **Kunwoo Park**, Ikbeom Lee, Gitae Lee, Namkyoo Park\textsuperscript{*} and Sunkyu Yu\textsuperscript{*}. Phase-sensitive engineering of optical disordered materials using heterogeneous networks. *Advanced Optical Materials* 14, e03499 (2026). [doi:10.1002/adom.202503499](https://doi.org/10.1002/adom.202503499).

2. Kyuho Kim\textsuperscript{\dagger}, **Kunwoo Park**\textsuperscript{\dagger}, Hyungchul Park, Sunkyu Yu, Namkyoo Park\textsuperscript{*} and Xianji Piao\textsuperscript{*}. Programmable photonic unitary circuits for light computing. *Nanophotonics* 14, 1429 (2025). [doi:10.1515/nanoph-2024-0602](https://doi.org/10.1515/nanoph-2024-0602).

### Conference Proceedings

1. Ikbeom Lee, **Kunwoo Park**, Seungmok Youn and Sunkyu Yu\textsuperscript{*}. Inverse design of microstructures of non-Hermitian scattering systems. SPIE Optics + Photonics 2025, 13578-59, San Diego, California, USA, 6 August 2025. [doi:10.1117/12.3062322](https://doi.org/10.1117/12.3062322).

2. **Kunwoo Park**, Ikbeom Lee, Seungmok Youn and Sunkyu Yu\textsuperscript{*}. Modularization of light scattering for photonic computing applications. SPIE Optics + Photonics 2025, 13581-25, San Diego, California, USA, 5 August 2025. [doi:10.1117/12.3062195](https://doi.org/10.1117/12.3062195).

3. Ikbeom Lee, **Kunwoo Park** and Sunkyu Yu\textsuperscript{*}. Design of wave scattering from gain and loss disordered materials. CLEO-PacificRim (CLEO-PR) 2024, Mo2J-4, Incheon, Republic of Korea, 5 August 2024. [doi:10.1109/CLEO-PR60912.2024.10676414](https://doi.org/10.1109/CLEO-PR60912.2024.10676414).

4. **Kunwoo Park**, Ikbeom Lee and Sunkyu Yu\textsuperscript{*}. Inverse design method of hyperuniform materials using system factorization. CLEO-PacificRim (CLEO-PR) 2024, Mo2J-2, Incheon, Republic of Korea, 5 August 2024. [doi:10.1109/CLEO-PR60912.2024.10676648](https://doi.org/10.1109/CLEO-PR60912.2024.10676648).

## Patents

1. Nonlinear unitary optical device. Sunkyu Yu, Namkyoo Park, Xianji Piao and **Kunwoo Park**. KR 10-2859166; US application 19/048,370; EU application 25156862.2.

## Grants and Fellowships

\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{@{} X r @{}}
Graduate Research Encouragement Grant (석사과정생연구장려금지원사업) & 2025 -- present \\
\textit{Principal Investigator} & \\
\end{tabularx}

## Teaching

\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{@{} X r @{}}
\textbf{Application of Quantum Mechanics} (Graduate), Teaching Assistant & Spring 2025 \\
Seoul National University & \\[4pt]
\textbf{Topics in Electro-physics} (Graduate), Teaching Assistant & Spring 2025 \\
Seoul National University & \\
\end{tabularx}

## Technical Skills

- **Theory and modeling:** Placeholder.
- **Computation:** Placeholder.
- **Experimentation:** Placeholder.
- **Software:** Placeholder.

## Professional Service

- Placeholder.

## References

Available upon request.

\vspace{0.3em}
\footnotesize{\textsuperscript{\dagger} Co-first authors. \textsuperscript{*} Corresponding authors.}
